german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant

pm_type.subtitle: A notable concentration in Core PM roles limits diversity in product management functions.

seniority.title: Hiring is spread across multiple levels
seniority.subtitle: No single seniority group clearly dominates the current market.
